creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
While building it locally, I get:
> ===>  Configuring for hs-ShellCheck-0.4.6
> exec: /usr/local/lib/ghc-8.0.2/bin/ghc: not found
> *** Error code 127

It has USE_CABAL, which I don't know anything about.
It is in the framework, so assigning to framework.
